Labor & Employment Senior Attorney - Pittsburgh, PAView Job ↗
2026-03-27
· Labor & Employment · 2–7 yrs · 2 elite matches
Show job description
Labor & Employment Litigation Counseling Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania Clark Hill is seeking a Labor & Employment Senior Attorney with 6+ years of experience. Candidates should have experience with a broad range of employment issues including workplace discrimination, harassment, retaliation, and wrongful termination. Litigation experience should include drafting pleadings, discovery, and motions. Experience taking and defending depositions, and conducting administrative hearings is a plus. Other responsibilities will include drafting workplace policies, conducting employee trainings, and providing day-to-day advice and counsel to employers. Candidates must be detail-oriented and should possess an excellent work ethic, excellent writing, communication, and research skills The salary range at the time of posting is $180,000 - $200,000 annually, based upon a full-time work schedule. Davis Graham serves clients nationally and internationally, with a strong focus on corporate ﬁnance and governance, mergers and acquisitions, natural resources, environmental law, real estate, intellectual property, and complex litigation. Show job description
Government Election Law Policy Lobbying Legislative District of Columbia Ballard Spahr LLP is seeking a highly qualiﬁed associate to join our Government Akairs and Public Policy practice group in Washington, D.C. Qualiﬁed candidates will have 4 to 6 years’ relevant experience. In this role, an Associate will assist in providing strategic counsel and compliance advice to clients on matters related to political and election law with a focus on lobbying and public policy, campaign ﬁnance, government ethics, and non-proﬁt law. Knowledge of the Federal Election Campaign Act, Lobbying Disclosure Act, Foreign Agents Registration Act, Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, and Ethics in Government Act, as well as state and federal pay-to-play laws, is ideal. Litigation Commercial Professional Liability Labor & Employment Minneapolis, Minnesota Foley Mansﬁeld is a national law ﬁrm with more than 110 attorneys in okices from coast to coast. We provide legal expertise, creative solutions and extensive trial experience for large corporations, small businesses, and individuals. We have an opportunity for a Litigation Attorney to join our Minneapolis commercial litigation team. The ideal candidate will have 5+ years of civil litigation experience, along with strong verbal and written communication skills. Prior experience in employment, general liability, professional liability, and/or commercial litigation is preferred. The candidate must be a self- starter, possess the ability to multi-task, and thrive in a fast-paced environment. Working with others in a team-oriented environment is essential. · Litigation · 2–4 yrs · 21 elite matches
Show job description
Litigation 147 of 221 Product Liability Chicago, Illinois Lathrop GPM is actively seeking a stak attorney with 2-4 years’ experience in product liability defense to join our growing Tort Insurance & Environmental practice group in our Chicago okice. Candidates should have a J.D. from an accredited law school, an active Illinois law license (Missouri law license a plus) and be in good standing, strong academic credentials, strong research, writing, and analytical abilities, excellent client service skills, outstanding interpersonal and problem- solving skills, and the ability to work in a collaborative environment. Deposition and court appearance experience are ideal but not required. The current anticipated salary range is $110,000 to $120,000. Actual initial salary may be above or below the identiﬁed ranges and will be based on relevant skills, training, experience, and other job-related factors consistent with applicable law. Energy Infrastructure Project Development Project Finance Los Angeles, California About Ashurst: Ashurst is a leading global law ﬁrm with a history spanning 200 years, and a clear strategy for our future growth. Our in-depth understanding of our clients and commitment to providing exceptional standards of service have seen us become a trusted adviser to local and global corporates, ﬁnancial institutions and governments in all areas of commercial law. To ﬁnd out more please visit here. Team overview: Ashurst is one of the most experienced and respected law ﬁrms active in the global infrastructure/projects market. We are consistently ranked Tier 1 in both Chambers and Legal 500 and our lawyers win praise for their deep knowledge of the industry sectors our clients operate in, such as energy and resources, transport, social infrastructure, construction, sports and telecommunications. We bring a breadth of perspective and commercial acumen that comes from advising on the full range

Labor & Employment NLRB Riverside, California Associate Attorney – Public Entity Labor and Employment Practice Group Speciﬁc skills sought are: At least three years of experience handling labor and employment matters, exclusively or predominantly as part of the candidate’s overall legal practice, for public and/or private clients; Experience with public sector clients such as cities, counties, and special districts or a demonstrated interest in public sector work is preferred; Experience with preparing a labor and employment case for trial/arbitration including actually participating in trials and/or arbitrations and in administrative proceedings; Knowledge and experience of public sector labor and employment law, including collective bargaining, administrative proceedings before Public Employment Relations Board (“PERB) , and employee beneﬁt/PERS issues; Deposition experience both as to percipient witnesses and expert witnesses in labor and employment cases and law and motion experien

Litigation Commercial San Jose, California The Litigation department at Berliner Cohen is actively recruiting for an Associate Attorney with 3 + years of litigation experience with an interest in business, commercial, trust & estate, and real estate. Candidates should possess a strong academic background, a proven track record of strong performance and measurable results, and exceptional communication, analytical, and writing skills. The ability to be a creative thinker and problem solver, and to be able to work independently, as well as with a team, is also required. Berliner Cohen, LLP, is a highly respected full-service business law ﬁrm in Northern California. If you are a self-starter, this is a great opportunity to grow your legal career at a community-focused, well-established ﬁrm. 2026-03-27
· Real Estate · 2–7 yrs · 7 elite matches
Show job description
Real Estate Construction P&S Leasing Development Land Use Cleveland, Ohio Bricker Graydon is seeking an experienced construction/real estate attorney to join its growing Northeast Ohio presence. The ideal candidate will have 5+ years’ experience providing real estate support in real estate transactions, including property acquisitions and dispositions, leasing, land use and real estate development matters. This position will have a heavy focus on property due diligence, title and survey review, site control drafting, interfacing with title companies, lenders and developers. Experience within the energy or construction industry, a plus. Candidates should also possess excellent academic credentials, high ethical standards, strong writing, analytical and communication skills and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively. Must possess strong project management skills and be able to work with multiple attorneys on a variety of assignments. Bricker Graydon is

Insurance Coverage Litigation Atlanta, Georgia Job Type Full-time The Associate attorney will manage a diverse caseload from inception through resolution, providing strategic legal counsel and representation in court, arbitrations, and depositions. This role requires exceptional research, drafting, and litigation skills, along with the ability to collaborate closely with partners and clients in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate demonstrates independence, strong communication, and a commitment to meeting a 1,950-hour annual billable requirement. Primary Job Duties: File review and legal analysis of claims and causes of action Advising clients through the claim investigation process, including the retention of consultants, conducting Examinations Under Oath, and opining on coverage. Litigation Atlanta, Georgia Atlanta, Georgia: Galloway is seeking an associate attorney to join our Atlanta okice and take on a meaningful role within a fast paced and growing practice that includes a mix of civil litigation and business-related work. This position is ideal for a practicing attorney who takes ownership of their work, exercises sound judgment, and wants to build a long-term career as part of a collaborative and expanding team. Our Atlanta practice handles a broad range of matters including commercial litigation, construction disputes, insurance defense, premises liability, trucking and transportation cases, and representation of business and development clients, with opportunities to assist on transactional and advisory work as the practice continues to grow. The ideal candidate is comfortable working in an active practice and is interested in developing a well-rounded skillset that may include both litigation and business-related matters. Real Estate P&S Leasing Detroit, Michigan Miller Canﬁeld is seeking a Real Estate Associate with approximately 4–6 years of experience to join its Chambers- recognized Real Estate Group in Troy or Ann Arbor. This position is ideal for a self directed attorney who is comfortable running transactions and taking ownership of projects with minimal supervision. Our Real Estate Group represents developers, investors, lenders, landlords, and governmental entities on sophisticated commercial real estate matters, including transactions involving ﬁnancing, development, leasing, acquisitions and dispositions, economic development incentives, and public private partnerships. We work hard, collaborate closely, and value good judgment. We pride ourselves on our culture and commitment to serving our clients and each other. Insurance Coverage Litigation Dallas, Texas Clark Hill PLC is seeking a ﬁrst-year Associate to join our Fidelity, Surety, & Coverage Business Unit in Dallas, TX. The Associate will join the ﬁrm at the beginning of September 2026. The oker of employment will be contingent upon the candidate’s completion of law school and sitting for the July 2026 Texas bar exam. The Associate will handle large dollar insurance coverage disputes around the country, primarily in federal courts, and evaluate insurance coverage claims, predominantly in the areas of crime and professional liability insurance. The ideal candidate will possess the following skillsets: • Exceptional written and oral communication skills • Strong academic credentials and a passion for excellence • The ability to thrive in a collaborative team-based setting All candidates are required to submit the following materials: • Cover Letter • Resume • Law School and Undergraduate Transcripts • Writing Sample The salary for this posi

FBT Gibbons distinguishes itself as a dynamic, forward- moving ﬁrm with a coast-to-coast footprint and a reputation for excellence across multiple practice areas and industries. Lauderdale, Florida Fisher Phillips, a leading national labor and employment law ﬁrm, is seeking an associate attorney with 2 or more years of litigation experience to join our Fort Lauderdale okice and our Education Practice Group. Litigation Los Angeles, California Squire Patton Boggs (US) LLP, a global law ﬁrm, seeks a Litigation Associate with a minimum of 1 year of general litigation experience. The individual hired for this position will be responsible for handling most aspects of litigation, including managing discovery requests and responses, drafting and arguing motions, conducting research, drafting memoranda and correspondence, attending hearings and court conferences, taking and defending depositions, and assisting with trial preparations and trial. · Labor & Employment · 2–7 yrs · 2 elite matches
Show job description
Labor & Employment Litigation Counseling District of Columbia St. Louis, Missouri New York City, New York Dallas, Texas Thompson Coburn is seeking an attorney with 3+ years of employment litigation experience to join its Labor and Employment team. The ideal candidate will have employment counseling and employment litigation experience, strong analytical and writing skills, and the ability to function both independently and within a team environment. The Firm welcomes applicants who are self-starters, comfortable with client interaction and seeking career development and advancement opportunities. This position is open to recruiters. All candidates must currently be licensed to practice law in the state in which the okice is located. The salary range for this position in our Dallas, New York, and Washington D.C. okices is $205,000 - $300,000. Banking Banking Real Estate Real Estate Lending Real Estate Finance Kentucky The Louisville, Kentucky okice of FBT Gibbons is seeking a CMBS Lending & Service Associate. FBT Gibbons LLP is a national, full-service law ﬁrm formed through the combination of Frost Brown Todd and Gibbons, bringing together more than 800 attorneys across 25 okices. Our attorneys oker comprehensive legal solutions to clients ranging from Fortune 500 companies and global multinationals to startups and nonproﬁts. FBT Gibbons distinguishes itself as a dynamic, forward- moving ﬁrm with a coast-to-coast footprint and a reputation for excellence across multiple practice areas and industries. Our reputation is further reinforced by its numerous Chambers and Best Lawyers ranked practices and attorneys. We are a people-ﬁrst ﬁrm recognized for our award-winning inclusive culture and a strong commitment to community and pro bono work. Labor & Employment NLRB Long Island, New York Focused on employment and labor law since 1958, Jackson Lewis P.C.’s 1,000+ attorneys located in major cities nationwide consistently identify and respond to new ways workplace law intersects business. We help employers develop proactive strategies, strong policies and business-oriented solutions to cultivate high-functioning workforces that are engaged and stable, and share our clients’ goals to emphasize belonging and respect for the contributions of every employee. The Firm is ranked in the First Tier nationally in the category of Labor and Employment Litigation, as well as in both Employment Law and Labor Law on behalf of Management, in the U.S. News - Best Lawyers® “Best Law Firms”. This position will be in our Melville location. For Long Island, the expected salary range for this position is between $192,500 - $262,500. Litigation Product Liability Class Action Los Angeles, California Type of Experience: Recognized as a “Litigation Powerhouse” and an eight-time Law360 Practice Group of the Year, King & Spalding’s Product Liability & Mass Torts practice seeks 2nd to 4th year tort litigation associates for the Los Angeles okice. The associates will be integral members of trial teams which handle the most signiﬁcant individual, multidistrict, mass tort, and class action lawsuits for product manufacturers across a wide spectrum of industries and in some of the most challenging jurisdictions for corporate clients. We operate as a collaborative team focused on exceptional client service and associate development opportunities. Qualiﬁed candidates will have outstanding academic credentials; strong research, writing, and oral advocacy skills; and tort litigation experience (mass torts, product liability, and/or toxic/environmental torts) at a large law ﬁrm. Houston, Texas · Labor & Employment · 3+ yrs · 1 elite match
Show job description
Focused on employment and labor law since 1958, Jackson Lewis P.C.’s 1,000+ attorneys located in major cities nationwide consistently identify and respond to new ways workplace law intersects business. We help employers develop proactive strategies, strong policies and business-oriented solutions to cultivate high-functioning workforces that are engaged and stable, and share our clients’ goals to emphasize belonging and respect for the contributions of every employee. The Firm is ranked in the First Tier nationally in the category of Labor and Employment Litigation, as well as in both Employment Law and Labor Law on behalf of Management, in the U.S. News - Best Lawyers® “Best Law Firms”. This position will sit in our Houston, TX location. Who We Are MoFo is a destination law firm for talented, ambitious attorneys who value collaboration, teamwork, and commitment to excellence. We are known around the world not only for delivering innovative yet practical client service but also for serving as an incubator for our top-notch talent. MoFo consistently receives top-tier rankings from leading directories and publications, speaking to our legal capabilities, dedication to creating an inclusive workplace, and commitment to our communities. Our Privacy Litigation Group Our group has successfully handled some of the largest and highest-profile privacy and data security class actions and investigations. We have a deep bench and a long and successful track record defending high-stakes cases that threaten a company’s reputation, business model, and bottom line. Arnold & Porter is seeking a junior to mid-level (2021 - 2025) Life Sciences Transactions associate for the Boston, New York, San Francisco, or Washington, DC office. Arnold & Porter’s premier and nationally ranked Life Sciences Transactions practice works closely with life sciences companies of all stages to structure their deals to develop, protect and commercialize their cutting-edge pharmaceuticals, biologics, medical devices, diagnostics and digital health products. Clients include Abbvie, Alcon, Amneal, argenx, AstraZeneca, Catalyst, Denali, Dr. Reddy’s, Eli Lilly, Novartis, Pfizer, Sandoz, and Sanofi. Our cross-office team is collaborative, close-knit, supportive, and collegial. Our practice is thriving and growing. Mid-Level Associate – Commercial Finance (Atlanta)View Job ↗
2026-03-05
Atlanta, Georgia · Banking · 2–6 yrs · 2 elite matches
Show job description
Kilpatrick Townsend & Stockton LLP is seeking a mid-level associate with at least two years of related experience to join our Commercial Finance team in our Atlanta office. Our Commercial Finance team represents clients in a diverse array of secured financing transactions, advising on a broad spectrum of complex deals including syndicated lending transactions, leveraged acquisitions, and mezzanine/second lien structured lending. Associates work closely with experienced practitioners and regularly collaborate with our Mergers & Acquisitions team to support acquisition financings and other strategic transactions. You will play an integral role in structuring, negotiating, and closing sophisticated financing matters. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with commercial lending transactions, strong drafting and analytical skills, and the ability to manage multiple matters in a fast-paced environment. Qualifications: At least 2 years of relevant experience in commercial finance

Labor & Employment Litigation Counseling Los Angeles, California Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, a full-service Fortune 100 ﬁrm, is seeking an attorney to work in its growing national management-side Employment, Labor & Workforce Management (ELWM) practice. Candidates should have a minimum of seven years of relevant labor and employment law experience but welcome all levels to apply. This position requires knowledge of federal and state labor & employment laws (e.g., wage and hour, Title VII of the Civil Rights Act, ADEA, FMLA, ADA, and similar state laws). Candidates must possess strong academic credentials and have excellent communication and writing skills. We have garnered national recognition for our demonstrated commitment to the recruitment, retention and advancement of qualiﬁed female and diverse attorneys. Skadden, Arps, Slate, Meagher & Flom 1 role · 1 match · best 180
Mid-Level AssociateView Job ↗
2026-01-05
District of Columbia · International Trade · 4–6 yrs · 1 elite match
Show job description
Skadden’s National Security group in Washington, D.C. is seeking an outstanding mid-level associate (classes 2021-2019). Candidates should have four to six years of relevant experience, which includes significant CFIUS, export controls, and/or sanctions/AML. Candidates seeking relocation are welcome to apply. High level of academic achievement and excellent writing skills is a must. The starting base salary for this Washington, D.C. position is expected to be between, $365,000 to $420,000 annually. Actual salary will be determined based on skills, experience (to the extent relevant) and other job-related factors, consistent with applicable law. This position may be eligible for a discretionary year-end bonus.

Our growing Minneapolis office has an opportunity for a Litigation Attorney with a minimum of five years of litigation experience. Responsibilities will include client contact and responsibility for managing their own cases. This position offers the flexibility for remote, hybrid, or in-person work. Skills and Educational Requirements JD with excellent academic credentials Minimum of five years of experience working on general litigation Construction law experience is preferred but not required Ability to handle complex litigation matters from inception to trial, including preparation of pleadings and briefs, managing discovery and depositions, and conducting legal research, analysis, and writing Experience with both state and federal court proceedings Proven ability to engage directly with clients, delivering clear advice and building trusted relationships Demonstrated interest in firm leadership Ability to handle multiple priorities in a timely and professional manner Minnesota Bar a

Show job description
Intellectual Property Patent Associate | Atlanta, GA | #21474 Eversheds Sutherland (US) LLP is seeking a Patent Associate to work with its Intellectual Property practice group in any of our offices or remotely. We are looking to add a team member with 3-4 years of experience in patent preparation and prosecution. The individual will join a sophisticated practice that advises clients on developing and expanding their IP portfolios, including identifying and protecting innovations related to cloud computing, machine learning/artificial intelligence, digital image processing, wireless communications and standards, autonomous vehicle technologies, automotive electrical systems, network and device security, augmented reality, mobility, consumer electronics, e-commerce, optics, wireless charging, and energy management. Los Angeles, California; New York City, New York · Banking, Entertainment · 4+ yrs · 2 elite matches
Show job description
DLA Piper is, at its core, bold, exceptional, collaborative and supportive. Our people are the backbone, heart and soul of our firm. Wherever you are in your professional journey, DLA Piper is a place you can engage in meaningful work and grow your career. Let’s see what we can achieve. Together. Summary DLA Piper is seeking an experienced mid-level finance associate with a strong interest in the media & entertainment industry to join its Sports, Media & Entertainment group in our Los Angeles or New York office. This is an exciting opportunity to join a cutting-edge and expanding practice that represents many notable clients across the music, film, TV, sports and entertainment industries, including global entertainment, music and media companies, banks, asset managers, financial institutions and private credit funds, as well as media business entrepreneurs in market-leading senior, junior, mezzanine and structured debt and equity financings. Litigation Arbitration Commercial District of Columbia Paul Hastings LLP has a top-ranked practice in international arbitration that is building the future of international arbitration through continued growth as part of the dynamic trajectory of our premier global ﬁrm. The Washington, D.C. okice is seeking truly exceptional candidates for junior to mid-level associate positions with international arbitration experience. Associates will join a collaborative, vibrant, world-class team. We value premium lawyering skills, a team-oriented approach, professional ethics and a high level of motivation for the ﬁeld. Outstanding academic credentials and a minimum of two years or more of law ﬁrm experience in commercial and investment arbitration are important. Full professional ﬂuency in English is required and professional Spanish ﬂuency is preferred. Mid-Level State and Local Tax AssociateView Job ↗
2026-02-13
Chicago, Illinois; Los Angeles, California; New York City, New York · Tax · 3–5 yrs · 1 elite match
Show job description
Description Baker McKenzie’s Tax Practice is a leader within our Firm and one of the most highly regarded tax practice in the world. Ranked Band 1 by Chambers Global for its work worldwide, the Tax Practice is recognized by clients and industry peers for the quality tax advice it provides worldwide. Baker McKenzie’s Tax Practice expertly covers all aspects of tax planning and transactions, dispute resolution (both administrative and litigation), tax policy, transfer pricing, indirect taxes and wealth management tax advice and planning. The Chicago, Los Angeles, or New York office of Baker McKenzie seeks a Mid-Level Tax Associate for its State and Local Tax sub-practice group. Successful candidates will have 3-5 years of relevant experience in resolving tax disputes with state and local revenue authorities. Candidates must have strong analytical and writing skills, exceptional speaking and interpersonal skills and the ability to function smoothly in a global-team environment with cultur

Description We are seeking a talented junior/mid-level associate with two to five years of experience to join our Investment Funds team. Our team advises fund sponsors in all stages of their operations, including, structuring and fundraising private funds and other investment vehicles across a variety of asset classes and strategies (venture capital, private equity, real estate, etc.), as well as organizing their general partner, management company and related entities. In addition, we also represent significant institutional investors in investing in private funds. You will be a key member of a growing and dynamic team. Because of the breadth of Baker McKenzie’s funds platform, your expertise and problem-solving abilities will be appreciated and valued.
